headlines.title: Elon Musk Takes Stand in High-Stakes OpenAI Trial
headlines.summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk testified in a bitter feud against OpenAI cofounders Sam Altman and Greg Brockman that could reshape AI development future.

headlines.title: Nvidia B300 Servers Hit $1 Million in China Amid US Curbs
headlines.summary: Exclusive report shows Nvidia's B300 server prices reaching $1 million in China due to US export restrictions on AI chips.

headlines.title: Human Brain May Work More Like AI Than Expected
headlines.summary: Scientists discover the human brain understands spoken language in ways that closely resemble advanced AI language models.

headlines.title: TADI: New Agentic AI System for Drilling Operations
headlines.summary: Tool-Augmented Drilling Intelligence transforms operational data into evidence-based analytical insights for the energy sector.

top_story.title: Elon Musk vs OpenAI Trial Reshaping AI Future
top_story.summary: The legal battle between Elon Musk and OpenAI leadership could fundamentally change how artificial intelligence is developed and governed. Musk testified Tuesday about his concerns over OpenAI's shift from non-profit to for-profit status.
